prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZC1-T** (2.3L turbocharged inline-4) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, custom **Tomei 264° camshafts**, and a **HKS F-Con V Pro** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Upgraded fuel system includes **Walbro 450LPH** fuel pump, **ID1000** injectors, and a **Radium Engineering** fuel rail.

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG Stage 3+ gearset** in the **Isuzu MUA5** 5-speed transmission, **OS Giken Super Lock** limited-slip differential, and **Spec Stage 3+** clutch. Custom **Godspeed Project** aluminum driveshaft to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV** coilovers (custom valved for the Piazza’s **R32** chassis), **SuperPro** poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms), and **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (front) with **DBA 5000 Series** rotors and **Hawk HT-10** brake pads.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon Carbon** splitter, and rear diffuser) paired with a **Veilside Fortune** rear wing (modified for Piazza mounting points).

Custom **JDM-spec** livery featuring **3M 1080 Gloss Black** base with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** accents, hand-painted **Isuzu Racing** decals (1980s Group B rally style), and **VHT Flameproof** clear coat for durability.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD** seats (retrimmed in **Alcantara with red stitching**), **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel, **Defi BF** gauges (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **Custom Cages** A-pillar pod, and **Soundstream** 12-inch subwoofer in a **custom-fabricated** rear enclosure.
